title: Kalamata, Peloponnese — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kalamata, Peloponnese: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kalamata is a city in Peloponnese with a population of 69,849. The heart of the Messinian region, famous for its olives, seaside promenade, and medieval castle.

Last updated: July 09, 2026
